title: solena heterophylla subsp. napaulensis
intro: Solena heterophylla subsp. napaulensis, also known as the Himalayan prickly chaff flower, is a plant species belonging to the family Cucurbitaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Solena heterophylla subsp. napaulensis include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
